summary: The page renders all 11 sections in correct order with faithful text, correct EDS signature classes, and a strong visual match (93.3% pixel match). Main deductions stem from the hero arrow icon being oversized/wrong rotation and several long-RTF/ISI typography deviations (font-size, weight, and color) flagged by computed-style assertions.

issues.actual: Rendered at 41x41px and rotated 45deg (points down-right in render)
issues.fix: Constrain icon to 29x29px and verify rotation matches the up-right arrow design

issues.actual: Computed font-size 18px and color rgb(33,37,41) on 'Hepatitis B virus reactivation' block
issues.fix: Ensure the !important 15px/#000000 rules actually win over Bootstrap defaults in the browser
Apply font-weight:700 to the ep-l-h heading

issues.expected: Bold lead-in 'Hepatitis B virus reactivation:' weight 700
issues.fix: Ensure strong tags inside ep-l-ul render at 700

issues.expected: Hero title aligned with design baseline; worst mismatch region at y576-672 (65%)
issues.actual: Slight offset/scale differences in hero content region
issues.fix: Verify hero content positioning and font scale against artboard

issues.expected: Card content matches design copy exactly (design shows 5 cards, two-row layout)
issues.actual: Card order/content largely matches but card titles use 24px; verify against spec values
issues.fix: Confirm card title sizes and line-heights match design
